summary: Add pp:no-error-path-probe annotation to the get-group command.
reason: Splitwise returns HTTP 200 with an empty/error envelope for unknown group IDs, so dogfoods error_path probe (which expects a non-zero exit for invalid args) false-fails. The annotation suppresses that probe. This hand-edit existed on the prior v4.16.0 print and was dropped when the v4.19.0 reprint regenerated the generated file.
validated_outcome: Publish live gate (dogfood --live --level full) get-group error_path passes; full matrix 115/115.
